| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes

{{nihongo|'''Shitaru Norito Shrine'''|志多留能理刀神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tsushima]].

{{nihongo|'''Shitaru Norito Shrine'''|志多留能理刀神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tsushima]].

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Shitaru Norito Shrine
| native_name = 志多留能理刀神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none

{{nihongo|'''Shitaru Norito Shrine'''|志多留能理刀神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tsushima]].

{{nihongo|'''Shitaru Norito Shrine'''|志多留能理刀神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tsushima]].

{{nihongo|'''Shitaru Norito Shrine'''|志多留能理刀神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tsushima]].
